carpet.rule.creativeNoClip.name: Creative No Clip
carpet.rule.creativeNoClip.extra.0: On servers it needs to be set on both
carpet.rule.creativeNoClip.extra.1: client and server to function properly.
carpet.rule.creativeNoClip.extra.2: Has no effect when set on the server only
carpet.rule.creativeNoClip.extra.3: Can allow to phase through walls
carpet.rule.creativeNoClip.extra.4: if only set on the carpet client side
carpet.rule.creativeNoClip.extra.5: but requires some trapdoor magic to
carpet.rule.creativeNoClip.extra.6: allow the player to enter blocks
carpet.rule.missingTools.extra.0: Pickaxes are effective on pistons in 1.16
carpet.rule.hopperCounters.name: Hopper Counters
carpet.rule.hopperCounters.desc: hoppers pointing to wool will count items passing through them
carpet.rule.hopperCounters.extra.0: works only in SP, and will slow down players
carpet.rule.hopperCounters.extra.1: Enables /counter command, and actions while placing red and green carpets on wool blocks
carpet.rule.hopperCounters.extra.2: Use /counter <color?> reset to reset the counter, and /counter <color?> to query
carpet.rule.hopperCounters.extra.3: In survival, place green carpet on same color wool to query, red to reset the counters
carpet.rule.hopperCounters.extra.4: Counters are global and shared between players, 16 channels available
carpet.rule.hopperCounters.extra.5: Items counted are destroyed, count up to one stack per tick per hopper
carpet.rule.smoothClientAnimations.name: Smooth Client Animations
carpet.rule.smoothClientAnimations.desc: smooth client animations with low tps settings
carpet.rule.smoothClientAnimations.extra: works only in SP, and will slow down players
carpet.settings.command.change_permanent: click to keep the settings in %s to save across restarts
carpet.settings.command.default_removed: Rule %s will no longer be set on restart
